text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Grass Wonder has come to the seaside summer camp along with the
other Tracen Academy students.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: Good morning, Trainer.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, to train right after waking up each day—it doesn't get any
better than this.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Summer camp is a valuable opportunity, and I intend to make the
most of it.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: I'm glad you're here with me. Let's get to work. ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: And so, our summer training camp begins...

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: Huff, puff... I cannot seem to... run at my best...

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Trainer, I'm going to run one more lap... I'm not yet satisfied... with my
results...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: She doesn't seem to be reaching the goals she's set for herself.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
But at this point, her form seems to be worsening from exhaustion.
Any more and she's likely to get injured...
choice_data_list: Actually, we should call it a day.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: No, I'm fine... I can still run...

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: I... have to train—

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: Understood. Then I'll head back to my room. Good day, Trainer.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Taking it much better than I thought she would, Grass Wonder heads
back to the lodge.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Later that night...

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: Trainer, there you are.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
I'd heard there's a summer festival nearby, so I came to invite you.
Would you like to join me?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I thought she'd be frustrated about not training more, but she seems
like her usual calm self.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Heehee, festivals are a staple of summer in Japan, so we can get an
appreciation for the culture there.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
I find quiet places more desirable for taking walks, but festivals have
their own unique, vibrant mood.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Ah, look at this. They have whole candied watermelons. I trust you
haven't spoiled your appetite?
choice_data_list: I can't eat a whole watermelon!

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Haha, that was merely in jest. We can still have fun without getting
carried away.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As we wander around the many stalls, Grass Wonder suddenly stops in
front of the shooting gallery.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: Ah, look at that kitty plushie. It's adorable.

text_block_list.name: Shooting Gallery Staff
text_block_list.text: You've a good eye, miss. Care to test your skills?

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: You know what... Trainer, I'm going to try for it.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The normally peaceful Grass Wonder holds a rifle at the ready. I'm so
engrossed at the unusual sight when...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Pew! Dink...

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: I did it! In a single shot, no less. ♪

text_block_list.name: Shooting Gallery Staff
text_block_list.text: What a hit! Congratulations!

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: Thank you! ...Now then, I still have some shots left.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Pew! Dink... Pew! Dink...

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: Oh my, look at all these stuffed toys.

text_block_list.name: Shooting Gallery Staff
text_block_list.text:
I-I'm blown away. You got every prize in one go... You some kinda
hitman?

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Oh, I'm nothing so sinister. I simply have a steady hand, thanks to the
inner harmony I maintain. ♪

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
What fun we had at the festival. ♪ Even at training camp, it's vital to
relax sometimes.
choice_data_list: You sure you wouldn't rather be running?

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: Hehehe, a part of me would, yes.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
As you know, I don't like to yield or relent, so I've no intention of
compromising on my goals.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
But I'm only able to be so stubborn because I have a trainer like you
to support me.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: You're the only one who insists that I stop when I truly need to stop.
choice_data_list: I'll always be here to help you.
I'll always be here to help you.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
And I'll always run with all my heart. So, be it summer camp or
whatever lies ahead, you have my complete trust.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The next day, I decide to respond to Grass Wonder's dedication by
giving her a brand new training scheme that works the entire body
instead of just her legs.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: Phew... I've finished the long-distance swimming.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
I see you've incorporated some water training to keep the impact off
my legs.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
But... wait. Was that the last set? How strange—I still have plenty of
energy to run.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: Trainer, did you make a mistake with the schedule?

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
"To speak without words"... You always understand me better than
anyone, hehe. ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
If I want to help Grass Wonder be her best, it looks like I'll need some
extraordinary speed of my own to keep up.
